name: b300_8gpu_dgx
_comment: NVIDIA HGX/DGX B300 8-GPU server: same Blackwell Ultra chip as gb300.72gpu (288 GB HBM3E, 12 TB/s HBM BW, FP16 dense 2500 TFLOPS/GPU per framework convention; FP8 = 5000, FP4 = 10000 by linear byte scaling), NVLink5 1.8 TB/s bidir (900 GB/s single-direction) per GPU. Single 8-GPU NVLink5 domain via 4 NVSwitch5 chips. B_agg = 8 × 900 GB/s = 7.2 TB/s single-dir system aggregate. Cross-node would be InfiniBand (CX7 ≈50 GB/s per port). Use this spec for production 8-GPU B300 deployments instead of gb300.72gpu when modeling TP ≤ 8 — they share the same chip but differ in topology size beyond 8 GPUs (the rack-scale gb300 spans 72 GPUs in one NVLink domain; the 8-GPU server falls back to IB for cross-node). Matches the b200.8gpu / gb200.72gpu pairing pattern.
